commit.subject: LU-0000 llite: Odd check in free_user_pages
commit.message:
LU-0000 llite: Odd check in free_user_pages

This check seems bogus and it does have some cost in this
loop...

Can we remove it?  This is *purely* to see what happens
with testing.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I92a621bcd4bbb16ce33a7adcace6fdd2a7330b82
